context: User has a broken review command with multiple anti-patterns.

checklist.name: Identifies agent: plan issue
checklist.description: Explains that `agent: plan` is read-only and cannot fix bugs/modify files

checklist.name: Removes or fixes slash command reference
checklist.description: Removes `run /test` (agents can't invoke slash commands) and replaces with `npm test` or similar

checklist.name: Fixes double $ARGUMENTS usage
checklist.description: Does not use `$ARGUMENTS` twice in the same template; restructures to avoid duplication

checklist.name: Fixes agent to build or removes it
checklist.description: Either removes `agent:` (uses default) or changes to `agent: build` for file-modifying work
